question: How can i talk to a customer care executive
answer: As an virtual agent I am unable to make calls, I can give resolution on your queries on text messages.

question: Who has done this payment as I have not done any such transaction?
answer: We take all fraud reporting very seriously and ensure prompt handling for all such cases. Request you to reset and change all your PINs and Passwords immediately. No executive from Bajaj Pay will ever ask for OTP or any PIN/Passwords. Request you to ensure that you do not disclose any such sensitive information to anyone. Please access the Passbook section in the App or Website and select the Transaction and click on "Report a fraud" in the Help & Support section

question: Why did my payment failed
answer: We regret to inform you that the failure has happened due to network issue, request you to retry after sometime.

question: Why should I wait for 48 hours for RAR resolution
answer: This time is taken to validate the issue so that we can assist you with the best possible resolution. Request you to wait

question: Unable to use Wallet from your app
answer: I understand that you're experiencing an error when trying to use your wallet for payment. Please follow the steps provided.Go to phone settings Click on Application Select the app and clear cache If required, uninstall and reinstall the app. Try after sometime, if the issue persists, raise a request with us, including details about the error message you received. CTA Label: Raise a Request, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, Web CTA link:https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=RAR
